| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 181 | an..99 | Contains value of PDS56 if present in Mastercard’s request. For exact data format see Mastercard CIS, DE48 PDS56 description |

#### Tag 182 – Processing date and time

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 182 | N 12 | Date and time of transaction processing at the message originator. The date and time are be provided in local timezone of the transaction originator.Format: YYMMDDhhmmss |

#### Tag 183 – Card ID

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 183 | N 12 | Card ID |

#### Tag 184 – Merchant Country of Origin

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 184 | N .. 3 | Merchant Country of Origin.ISO 3166-1 numeric code of the country. |

#### Tag 185 – Merchant-Initiated Transaction flag

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 185 | N .. 3 | Contains a type of a merchant-initiated transaction (MIT):0 – not a MIT;1 – incremental authorization;2 – resubmission;3 – delayed charges;4 – reauthorization;5 – no show;6 – account top-up;7 – unscheduled payment. |

#### Tag 190 SVFE Account Type

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 190 | N .. 2 | SVFE Account Type.Optional for 1100/1120/1200/1220 messages.Valid values:
*   1 – Checking
*   2 – Savings
*   3 – Credit Card
*   4 – Other
*   5 – Loans
*   6 – Envelope
*   7 – Escrow
*   8 – Money Market
*   9 – Loaylty

 |

#### Tag 192 – Card Product Category

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 192 | ANS 1 | Card Product Category. Valid values:
*   C – Credit
*   D – Debit
*   P – Prepaid
*   M – Commercial

 |

#### Tag 193 – Corporate program verified flag

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 193 | n 1 | Valid values:‘0’ = Card is NOT involved in the Corporate program‘1’ = Card is involved in the Corporate program |

#### Tag 199 – Card Brand

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 199 | ANS..3 | Card Brand (or Program Indicator or Card Type) from Payment System BIN Ranges files.For MasterCard – Card Program values “as is”.For VISA (depends on VISA’s Card Type):
*   VEL for VISA’s ‘E’,
*   VPA for VISA’s ‘V’
*   DEF for all other card types.

For other payment systems – the value of the tag is DEF. |

#### Tag 200 – Original POS Entry Mode

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | N3 | Original POS Entry Mode value which were used in transaction. For requests should contains ISO 8583 DE#22 value as was received from acquirer. For advices may contain DE#22 value which were sent to an issuer. |

#### Tag 201 – Original POS Condition Code

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 201 | N3 | Original POS Entry Mode value which were used in transaction. For requests should contains ISO 8583 DE#22 value as was received from acquirer. For advices may contain DE#22 value which were sent to an issuer. |

#### Tag 202 – Authorization Source

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 202 | ANS..4 | Applicable for complete transactions only (advices to SVFM). This tag has up to 3 subfields:
*   position 1 – Authorizer
*   position 2 – Authorization result
*   positions 3-4 – Additional information

Authorizer could be one of the following:

*   **F** – response was set by SVFE module,
*   **N** – response was set be network response code mapping,
*   **M** – when SVFE receives Auth Advice from network,
*   **A** – when SVFE receives Auth Advice from an on-us device.

Authorization Results:

*   A – approve,
*   D – decline.

Additional information may contain a task id which is responsible for authorization. |

#### Tag 203 – Basket ID

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 203 | N..24 | Basket ID. NSPK Field 48.38. |

#### Tag 204 – Cardholder/Merchant Initiated Transaction Indicator

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 204 | An4 | Cardholder/Merchant Initiated Transaction Indicator. Mastercard DE48.SE22.SF05 |

#### Tag 223 – SCA exemption result

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 223 | ans…999 | Result of SCA exemption processing.Optional for response message if SCA exemption data (tag 173) is present in the request message.See description Tag 223 – SCA exemption result |

#### 800-899 – Payment systems data

| Tag No |  | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 800-899 |  | Ans..993 | Could be used to transmit additional data received from Payment Systems. |

#### Tag 900-999 – Private use data

| Tag No | Size | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 900-999 | Ans..993 | Could be used to transmit private use data |

# Appendix B (Field 54)

## Structure Field 54

| Size | Data |
| --- | --- |
| LLL | Tag 001 | Tag 002 | … | Tag N |
| 3 | LLL – 3 |  |  |  |

## Structure Tags of Data Field 54

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NNN | NNN | Ans .. 99 |
| 3 | 3 |  | NNN bytes |  |  |

## Usages of Data Field 54.

Exact list of tags and their content depends on usage of Data Field 54. Please refer to proper usage below.

### Usage 1 – Common Host-to-Host Interface.

#### Tag 001 – Acquirer Fee Amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 001 | NS12 | Acquirer Fee Amount, in transaction currency. This amout is included in Amount, Transaction. Could be negative. |

#### Tag 004 – Issuer Fee Amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 004 | NS12 | Issuer Fee Amount, in account currency. Could be negative. |

#### Tag 005 – Amount, Available balance

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 005 | N12 | Amount, Available balance |

#### Tag 006 – Currency, Available balance

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 006 | N3 | Currency, Available balance |

#### Tag 007 – Amount, Cash Back

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 007 | N12 | Amount, Cash Back |

#### Tag 008 – Amount, Credit Initial

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 008 | N12 | Amount, Credit Initial |

#### Tag 009 – Amount, Total Credit

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 009 | N12 | Amount, Total Credit |

#### Tag 010 – Acquirer Fee Amount (BIN Currency)

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 010 | N12 | Acquirer Fee Amount (BIN Currency) |

#### Tag 011 – Currency, Virtual Card

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 011 | N3 | Currency, Virtual Card |

#### Tag 012 – Virtual Card Limit

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 012 | N12 | Virtual Card Limit |

#### Tag 013 – Amount, Gratuity (Tips)

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 013 | N12 | Amount GratuityIf available must be present in all request messages. |

#### Tag 014 – Currency, Gratuity (Tips)

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 014 | N3 | Gratuity CurrencyIf available must be present in all request messages. |

#### Tag 015 – Amount, Available Balance for Goods & Services

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 015 | an 12 | Available Balance for Goods & Services. This amount used to show available balance for all card operation except cash withdrawal operations.Used for Balance Inquire transaction. |

#### Tag 016 – Amount, Available Balance for Cash Withdrowal

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 016 | an 12 | Available Balance for Cash Withdrawal. This amount used to show available balance for manual and pos withdrawal operations.Used for Balance Inquire transaction. |

#### Tag 017 – Amount, Available Balance for ATM CashWithdrowal

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 017 | an 12 | Available Balance for ATM Cash Withdrawal. This amount used to show available balance for ATM Cash Withdrawal only.Used for Balance Inquire transaction. |

#### Tag 018 Common – Current Account Balance

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 018 | an 16 | Current Account Balance (a balance not affected by hold and blocked amounts):Position 1 – Balance Sign (C or D)Positions 2-3 – Account Balance, amountPositions 14-16 – Account Currency (ISO N3 Format)Could be present in 1110/1130/1210/1230/1430 messages and contains account balance.Available Balance = **Account Balance** - Hold Amount – Blocked Amount. |

#### Tag 018 Custom – Online Limit Setup

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 018 | ans…999, must be divided by 20 i.e. 20, 40, 60, 80 etc | Multiple lists of limit records. Each record contains:8 Characters for BO limit name.12 Digits of limit’s amount. |

#### Tag 019 Amount – Acquirer Fee Tax

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 019 | n 15 | Acquirer fee tax amount1-12 tax amount13-15 tax currency code (ISO N3 Format) |

#### Tag 020 Amount – Issuer Fee Tax

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 020 | n 15 | Issuer fee tax amount1-12 tax amount13-15 tax currency code (ISO N3 Format) |

#### Tag 021 Electronic Certificate amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 021 | n 12 | Amount paid using Electronic Certificate |

#### Tag 900 – DPP Data

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 900 | an 36 | DPP Amounts::Position 1-12 – Total Interest AmountPosition 13-24 – Regular Installment AmountPosition 25-36 – Last Installment Amount |

### Usage 2 – Interface to Fraud Prevention System.

#### Tag 002 – Transaction Amount, Transaction currency

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 002 | N12 | Transaction Amount, Transaction currency. Must be present in 1100/1200/1420/1421 messages for 775, 705, 750, 703, 691, 692, 785 SVFE transaction types only. |

#### Tag 003 – Transaction Currency

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 003 | N3 | Currency of transaction. Must be present in 1100/1200/1420/1421 messages for 775, 705, 750, 703, 691, 692, 785 SVFE transaction types only. For 703 SVFE transaction type it contains Account TO Currency. |

#### Tag 007 – Current Account Available Balance and Currency

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 007 | AN16 | Current Account Available Balance:Position 1 – Balance Sign (C or D)Positions 2-13 – Account Balance, amountPositions 14-16 Account Currency, (ISO N3 Format)Could be present in 1110/1130/1210/1230/1430/1120/1220 messages and contains account available balance. |

#### Tag 011 – Transaction Amount, Account Currency.

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 011 | N12 | Transaction Amount in Account Currency. |

#### Tag 012 – Transaction Amount, National Currency

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 012 | N12 | Transaction Amount converted to National Currency. |

#### Tag 013 – Transaction Amount, United States Dollars

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 013 | N12 | Transaction Amount converted to United States Dollars |

#### Tag 014 – Transaction Amount, Euro

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 014 | N12 | Transaction Amount converted to Euro |

#### Tag 015 – Current Account Available Balance, National Сurrency

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 015 | N12 | Current Account Available Balance converted to National Currency.Could be present in 1110/1130/1210/1230/1430 messages and contains account available balance. |

#### Tag 016 – Current Account Available Balance, United States Dollars

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 016 | N12 | Current Account Available Balance converted to United States Dollars.Could be present in 1110/1130/1210/1230/1430 messages and contains account available balance. |

#### Tag 017 – Current Account Available Balance, Euro

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 017 | N12 | Current Account Available Balance converted toEuro.Could be present in 1110/1130/1210/1230/1430 messages and contains account available balance. |

#### Tag 018 – Amount, Cash Back

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 018 | N12 | Amount, Cash Back |

#### Tag 021 Electronic Certificate amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |

# Appendix C (Field 61)

## Structure Field 61

| Size | Data |
| --- | --- |
| LLL | Tag 001 | Tag 002 | … | Tag N |
| 3 | LLL – 3 |  |  |  |

## Structure Tags of Data Field 61

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NNN | NNN | Ans .. 99 |
| 3 | 3 |  | NNN bytes |  |  |

## Tag 001 – Cash-In Counters

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 001 | n 15 or n 30or n 45or n 60 | Counters at each active cassette (from 1 to 4) in format:n 3 – currency of cassetten 12 - amount in cassette |

## Tag 002 – Recycling Counters

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 002 | n 15 or n 30or n 45 | Counters at each active cassette (from 1 to 3) in format:n 3 – currency of cassetten 12 - amount in cassette |

## Tag 003 – Recycling Cash-Out Counters

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 003 | n 15 or n 30or n 45 | Cash-out counters at each active cassette (from 1 to 3) in format:n 3 – currency of cassetten 12 - cash-out amount from cassette |

## Tag 004 – Number Of Installments

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 004 | n..24 or n 2 | Numbers of installments: For response message 1110/1210 tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 1 of each set.For issuer driven installment confirmation 1120 tag contain selected number of installments. |

## Tag 005 – Minimum number of installments

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 005 | n 2 | Minimum number of installments. Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 23 subfield 1. |

## Tag 006 – Maximum number of installments

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 006 | n 2 | Maximum number of installments.Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 23 subfield 2. |

## Tag 007 – Interest rate

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 007 | n...60 (5 \* tag 003) | Interest rate:The value is sent with 2 decimal points (value 1% is sent as 00100 value of tag 006). Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 2 of each set or DE 112 SE 23 subfield 3. |

## Tag 008 – Installment fee

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 008 | n...144(12 \* tag 003) | Installment fee:Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 3 of each set or DE 112 SE 23 subfield 4. |

## Tag 009 – Annual percentage rate

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 009 | n…60(5 \* tag 003) | Annual percentage rate:The value is sent with 2 decimal points (value 1% is sent as 00100 value of tag 022). Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 4 of each set or DE 112 SE 23 subfield 5. |

## Tag 010 – First installment amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 010 | n…144(12 \* tag 003) | First installment amount:Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 5 of each set. |

## Tag 011 – Subsequent installment amount

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 011 | n…144(12 \* tag 003) | Subsequent installment amount:Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 22 subfield 6 of each set. |

## Tag 012 – Total amount due

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 012 | n...144(12 \* tag 003) | Total amount due:Tag is related to MC DE 112 SE 22 subfield 7 of each set or DE 112 SE 23 subfield 6. |

## Tag 013 – Payment option

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 013 | a 1 | Payment option:I – only installment payment is allowedF – only normal (full) payment is allowedB – both installment and normal (full) payments are allowedTag is related to MasterCard DE 112 SE 21 subfield 2 |

## Tag 014 – Count of installment payment options

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 014 | n 2 | The count of installment payment options.Tag is related to MasterCard DE 112:If MasterCard DE 112 SE 23 is present this value equal to 1. Otherwise this value equal to number of set in MasterCard DE 112 SE 22. |

| NN | NN | Ans .. 99 |

# Appendix F (Field 62)

## Structure Field 62

| Size | Data |
| --- | --- |
| LLL | Tag 001 | Tag 002 | … | Tag N |
| 3 | LLL – 3 |  |  |  |

## Structure Tags of Data Field 62

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NNN | NNN | Ans .. 999 |
| 3 | 3 |  | NNN bytes |  |  |

## Tag 001 – Authorization-related Information

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 001 | ans9 | Position 1 – Authorization source. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) – Unknown3 – SVFE as issuer1 – Foreign issuer entity |
|  |  | Position 2 – Address Verification Results. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – Address verification not required1 – Address verification successful2 – Address matches3 – ZIP / Postal Code matches4 – Address not matches5 – Other Address Verification results |
|  |  | Position 3 – PIN authorization flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – No PIN verification performed1 – Incorrect PIN, Foreign2 – Invalid PIN, Capture Card, or Excessive PIN failures3 – General PIN verification error4 – PIN Processing Errors or PIN Response Code undefined |
|  |  | Position 4 – CVV Authorization flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown2 – CVV Verification performed and successful3 – CVV Verification performed and failed, either invalid CVV or other error5 – CVV Verification not performed |
|  |  | Position 5 – CVV2 Authorization flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – CVV2 Verification not performed2 – CVV2 Verification performed and successful3 – CVV2 Verification performed and failed, either invalid CVV2 or other error |
|  |  | Position 6 – Card Authorization Flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – Online operation2 – ICC authorization, EMV check successful3 – ICC authorization, EMV check failed |
|  |  | Position 7 – 3D Secure Authorization flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – 3DS check not performed.2 – 3DS check successful3 – 3DS check failed |
|  |  | Position 8 – Track 1/2 Integrity flag. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Uknown0 – Manual transaction or track data is absent1 – Track1, Track2 are present3 – Track2 not present, Track1 present6 – Track2 present, Track1 not present |
|  |  | Position 9 – Track Expiration Date Presence. Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown1 – Either Track1 or Track2 are present2 – No track data is present |

## Tag 002 – Authorization type.

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 002 | ns1 | Valid values are:‘ ‘ – (blank space) Unknown0 – STIP authorization1 – SVFE authorization, our cards2 – CBS authorization3 – Foreign authorization |

## Tag 006 – Card’s BIN

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 006 | n6 | Contains first 6 digits of card’s number |

## Tag 009 – Card’s Service Code

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 009 | n3 | Contains Card’s Service Code, if present. |

## Tag 010 – Acquirer Institution ID

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 010 | an..255 | Contains Acquirer Institution ID. |

# Appendix G (Field 123)

## Structure Field 123

| **Size** | **Dataset** |
| --- | --- |
| LLLL | Dataset ID 0001 | Dataset ID 0002 | … | Dataset ID NNNN |
| 4 |  | LLLL – 4 |  |  |

## Structure Dataset of Field 123

| **Dataset ID** | **Size** | **Dataset Data ( TLV format )** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NNNN | NNNN | Ans …. 9999 |
| 4 | 4 |  | NNNN bytes |  |  |

## Structure Dataset Data of Field 123

| Tag No | Length | Data |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NN | NN | Ans .. 99 |
| 2 | 2 |  | NN bytes |  |  |

## Dataset ID 0001 – Enhanced mini-statement data

| Dataset ID | Size | Dataset usage |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 0001 | NNNN | Enhanced mini-statement data (see TLV data below). This dataset can be used in Common Host-to-Host interface only.Could be present in 1110/1210 message for 704 SVFE transactions type if Field 48.Tag011 is not present.More than one instance of the dataset could be present in the message. |

Tags content:

| Tag No | Description | Format | Mandatory | Comment/Remarks |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 01 | Time, Local Transaction | n 12 | M | Refer to Field 12: Time, Local Transaction |
| 02 | Processing Code | n 6 | M | Refer to Field 3: Processing Code |
| 03 | Debit/Credit Indicator | a 1 | M | “+” - credit transaction,“–“ - debit transaction,“>” – transfer transaction,blank – noop transaction. |
| 04 | Amount, Transaction | n 12 | M | Refer to Field 4: Amount, Transaction |
| 05 | Currency Code, Transaction | n 3 | M | Refer to Field 49: Currency Code, Transaction |
| 06 | Card Acceptor Identification Code | an 15 | O | Refer to Field 42: Card Acceptor Identification Code |
| 07 | Card Acceptor Name and Location | Ans..30 | O | Card Acceptor Name and Location |
| 08 | Authorization Identification Response | an 6 | O | Refer to Field 38: Authorizations Identification Response |
| 09 | Reversal flag | n 1 | O | 0 – normal transaction1 – reversal transaction |
| 10 | Transaction description | Ans..30 | O | Transaction description |
